title: Duolingo for musical instruments
summary: Learn guitar, piano, or drums in 5-min daily lessons with streaks and song unlocks.
description: A mobile-first learning app teaching instruments via short daily drills with feedback on timing and accuracy.

title: Budget coach for Gen Z
summary: A no-judgment money buddy that helps you save without feeling restricted.
description: Turns transactions into practical feedback. Daily digests, can-I-afford-it checks, weekly micro-goals.

title: Carbon-negative coffee subscription
summary: Every bag offsets 2x its footprint via verified reforestation partners.
description: Monthly coffee subscription combining premium beans with transparent carbon accounting.

title: CodeReview buddy — pair with an expert in 30 min
summary: Get 30 min of structured code review from verified senior engineers. Pay per session.
description: On-demand review marketplace where developers book short focused sessions with vetted senior engineers.

title: 3-minute mindfulness breaks during video calls
summary: Chrome extension suggesting guided breathing between back-to-back meetings.
description: Browser extension detecting meeting load and nudging users into short guided resets between calls.

title: StudyRooms: virtual library for focus sessions
summary: Body-doubling rooms where students join silent video sessions for accountability.
description: Focus platform recreating library energy online. Silent rooms, Pomodoro timers, goal declarations.

title: Hyper-local art commissions marketplace
summary: Commission artists from your city. Avoid long shipping with local fulfillment.
description: City-based platform connecting customers with nearby artists for custom commissions and local pickups.

title: Split rent and bills without fighting your roommates
summary: Auto-split rent, utilities, and groceries across flatmates with one tap.
description: Bill-sharing tool built around the messy reality of share-house finances. Templates, reminders, payment history.

title: AI tutor for university exam prep
summary: Personalised question banks and mock exams generated from your own lecture notes.
description: Upload your lecture slides and the app generates practice questions, highlights weak areas, and adapts difficulty based on your performance over time.

title: Freelancer invoice tracker with late payment nudges
summary: Stop chasing clients — automated reminders and escalation emails sent on your behalf.
description: Invoice management tool for freelancers with built-in payment chasing. Sends polite reminders, escalates tone automatically, and tracks days overdue.

title: Solar panel ROI calculator for homeowners
summary: Enter your address and energy bill — get a 10-year payback forecast in seconds.
description: Uses roof area estimation, local solar irradiance data, and energy tariffs to give homeowners a personalised solar investment forecast with break-even date.

title: Peer accountability app for fitness goals
summary: Commit to a workout with a friend — miss it and they see your shame post.
description: Social fitness app where users set weekly movement goals and pair with an accountability partner. Missing a goal auto-posts a custom shame message to their feed.

title: CLI tool that writes your git commit messages
summary: Runs git diff, summarises the changes, and suggests a conventional commit message.
description: A command-line tool that reads your staged diff and uses an LLM to suggest a well-formed conventional commit message. Supports custom templates and team conventions.

title: Second-hand textbook exchange for university students
summary: Buy, sell, and lend textbooks to students at your own university — no middleman.
description: Campus-locked marketplace for textbooks. Students list books they no longer need, others buy or borrow. Verified via university email. Pickup arranged on campus.

title: Newsletter monetisation platform for indie writers
summary: Everything Substack does, but you keep 97% of revenue and own your subscriber list.
description: A newsletter platform with paid subscriptions, tip jars, and one-off paid issues. No revenue share — flat monthly fee only. Full data portability so writers own their audience.
